subject: WM-0087 review: changes_requested
body: High: temp artifact root is acceptable and did not dirty tracked artifacts, and m5-alpha-content-long-run is OK on reviewer rerun, but required full-suite pnpm bench --artifacts-dir %TEMP%/wuming-town/WM-0087/review-bench-full-suite failed: entity-store median 318.948 ms vs baseline 244.507 ms (+30.45%), exceeding the 20% blocking threshold. Report claim that final bench all entries OK is not reproducible.
